requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 Formal Direction vs. GB/T On-Ground Reality in Laos
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC 62196正式导向与老挝GB/T接口实地现状
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC 62196正式導向與寮國GB/T接口實地現狀

summary.en: Laos' formal EV charging infrastructure direction, aligned with IEC-based standards adopted through DOSM and the ASEAN harmonisation framework, points to IEC 62196 connectors: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) for AC charging and CCS2 (Combined Charging System Combo 2, IEC 62196-3 configuration FF) for DC fast charging. MEM and EDL project specifications, when explicitly stated, reference IEC-family connector standards. However, ground reality in Laos as of 2026 is materially different: a significant and growing share of EVs on Lao roads are Chinese-brand vehicles (BYD Atto 3, SAIC-MG ZS EV, Wuling, and others) entering via the China-Laos Railway and BRI trade channels. These vehicles carry GB/T 20234.2 AC inlets and GB/T 20234.3 DC inlets, and a number of charging points in Vientiane and along the China-Laos corridor already operate GB/T hardware. This creates a genuine mixed-fleet, mixed-connector environment. For formal DOSM/EDL approval and IEC 62196 network deployment, GB/T connectors cannot plug into IEC 62196 Type 2 vehicle inlets and are not interchangeable. Exporters and project owners must clarify which connector ecosystem the specific site and fleet requires before equipment specification.
summary.zh: 老挝正式的电动汽车充电基础设施导向与通过DOSM和东盟协调框架采用的IEC体系标准保持一致，指向IEC 62196接口：交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用CCS2（IEC 62196-3 FF配置）。能源矿产部（MEM）和EDL的项目规范（如有明确说明）参照IEC体系接口标准。但截至2026年老挝实地情况与此存在实质性差异：中国品牌电动汽车（比亚迪Atto 3、上汽名爵ZS EV、五菱等）通过中老铁路和BRI贸易渠道进入老挝的比例显著且持续增加。这些车辆配备GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口，万象及中老走廊沿线已有多个充电站使用GB/T硬件。这形成了真实存在的混合车队、混合接口环境。就正式DOSM/EDL审批和IEC 62196网络部署而言，GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196 Type 2车辆接口，两者不可互换。出口商和项目业主在设备规格确定前须明确具体场地和车队所需的接口生态系统。
summary.zht: 寮國正式的電動汽車充電基礎設施導向與通過DOSM和東盟協調框架採用的IEC體系標準保持一致，指向IEC 62196接口：交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充使用CCS2（IEC 62196-3 FF配置）。能源礦產部（MEM）和EDL的項目規範（如有明確說明）參照IEC體系接口標準。但截至2026年寮國實地情況與此存在實質性差異：中國品牌電動汽車（比亞迪Atto 3、上汽名爵ZS EV、五菱等）通過中寮鐵路和BRI貿易渠道進入寮國的比例顯著且持續增加。這些車輛配備GB/T 20234.2交流接口和GB/T 20234.3直流接口，萬象及中寮走廊沿線已有多個充電站使用GB/T硬件。這形成了真實存在的混合車隊、混合接口環境。就正式DOSM/EDL審批和IEC 62196網絡部署而言，GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196 Type 2車輛接口，兩者不可互換。出口商和項目業主在設備規格確定前須明確具體場地和車隊所需的接口生態系統。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 / Mennekes)
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 / FF configuration)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, Laos) — IEC-adopted standards framework
ASEAN EV infrastructure harmonisation context (ASEAN Plan of Action for Energy Cooperation)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male at the charger side, female at the vehicle inlet — opposite to IEC 62196 Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact pin arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers use a nine-pin geometric configuration with CAN bus communication via GB/T 27930, which is geometrically and electrically incompatible with CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 DC fast charging. On-the-ground in Laos, a number of existing charging stations — particularly those established to serve Chinese-brand EVs entering via BRI — operate GB/T hardware and serve the Chinese-brand EV fleet. This dual-standard reality is Laos-specific and must be assessed per project.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与IEC 62196 Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器采用九针几何配置，通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，在几何形状和电气层面与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24直流快充均不兼容。在老挝实地，部分已建充电站——尤其是为通过BRI进入的中国品牌电动汽车提供服务而建立的——运行GB/T硬件并服务于中国品牌电动汽车车队。这种双标准现实是老挝特有的，须按具体项目评估。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與IEC 62196 Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器採用九針幾何配置，通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，在幾何形狀和電氣層面與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24直流快充均不兼容。在寮國實地，部分已建充電站——尤其是為通過BRI進入的中國品牌電動汽車提供服務而建立的——運行GB/T硬件並服務於中國品牌電動汽車車隊。這種雙標準現實是寮國特有的，須按具體項目評估。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: The connector gap in Laos has two dimensions: (1) Formal / regulatory: IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) and CCS2 (DC) are the standards-aligned choices for DOSM conformity and IEC-network deployment — a China GB/T-only charger cannot serve IEC 62196-inlet EVs and cannot satisfy formal DOSM/EDL project specifications written to IEC 62196. (2) Fleet reality: GB/T hardware already exists on the ground in Laos serving Chinese-brand EV fleets, and project owners serving these fleets may require GB/T connectors rather than IEC 62196. Multi-standard DC chargers offering both CCS2 and GB/T 20234.3 outlets are a technical option but must satisfy the applicable safety and conformity requirements for each connector type. Exporters must determine: which fleet the charger will serve; which connector the project owner / site operator specifies; whether DOSM formal approval is required; and whether a multi-standard design is feasible and certifiable for the Laos project context. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for connector-level interoperability.
gap.zh: 老挝的接口差距有两个维度：(1) 正式/监管层面：IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）是符合DOSM合格评定和IEC网络部署的标准选择——仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩无法为IEC 62196接口电动汽车充电，也无法满足按IEC 62196制定的正式DOSM/EDL项目规范。(2) 车队现实层面：GB/T硬件已在老挝实地存在并服务于中国品牌电动汽车车队，为这些车队服务的项目业主可能需要GB/T接口而非IEC 62196接口。提供CCS2和GB/T 20234.3双口的多标准直流充电桩是一种技术方案，但每种接口类型均须满足各自的安全和合格评定要求。出口商须确定：充电桩将服务的车队；项目业主/场地运营商指定的接口类型；是否需要DOSM正式审批；以及多标准设计是否可行并可在老挝项目背景下取得认证。转接器不是接口级互操作性的替代方案。
gap.zht: 寮國的接口差距有兩個維度：(1) 正式/監管層面：IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）和CCS2（直流）是符合DOSM合格評定和IEC網絡部署的標準選擇——僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁無法為IEC 62196接口電動汽車充電，也無法滿足按IEC 62196制定的正式DOSM/EDL項目規範。(2) 車隊現實層面：GB/T硬件已在寮國實地存在並服務於中國品牌電動汽車車隊，為這些車隊服務的項目業主可能需要GB/T接口而非IEC 62196接口。提供CCS2和GB/T 20234.3雙口的多標準直流充電樁是一種技術方案，但每種接口類型均須滿足各自的安全和合格評定要求。出口商須確定：充電樁將服務的車隊；項目業主/場地運營商指定的接口類型；是否需要DOSM正式審批；以及多標準設計是否可行並可在寮國項目背景下取得認證。轉接器不是接口級互操作性的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is the formal standards-aligned direction under DOSM and IEC-referenced project specifications; GB/T connectors serve the Chinese-brand EV fleet present in Laos but are not interoperable with IEC 62196 inlets; project-specific confirmation of required connector type is essential before equipment specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design; on-the-ground GB/T presence in Laos does not constitute formal DOSM approval or IEC 62196 conformity; multi-standard designs must satisfy requirements for each connector type separately

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos has a genuine dual-connector reality: IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for formal DOSM-aligned deployments, and GB/T hardware already present serving Chinese-brand EV fleets via BRI. These two ecosystems are physically incompatible — GB/T connectors cannot plug into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa. Confirm the target fleet, project specification, and DOSM conformity requirement before finalising connector choice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝存在真实的双接口现状：IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2用于正式DOSM合规部署，GB/T硬件已实地存在并通过BRI服务于中国品牌电动汽车车队。两种生态系统在物理上不兼容——GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。在最终确定接口选择前，须确认目标车队、项目规范和DOSM合格评定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國存在真實的雙接口現狀：IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2用於正式DOSM合規部署，GB/T硬件已實地存在並通過BRI服務於中國品牌電動汽車車隊。兩種生態系統在物理上不兼容——GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。在最終確定接口選擇前，須確認目標車隊、項目規範和DOSM合格評定要求。
